title: The Art of Public Speaking
description: For questions 17 – 24, read the text below. Use the word given in capitals at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

content.text: Many people experience a sense of (0) dread when asked to speak in public. This (17) can be so severe that it hinders professional growth. However, mastering the art of (18) is a skill that can be learned. || Experts suggest that (19) is the key to success. By (20) the main points of a speech, a speaker can maintain better focus. Furthermore, the (21) of a clear message is more important than using complex vocabulary. To (22) the audience, one should use relatable examples. Often, the (23) of a speech is what determines its long-term (24) on the listeners.

questions.explanation: Noun meaning anxiety or fear about the future.
Noun referring to the art of formal speaking.
Noun meaning the state of being ready.
Gerund/Noun meaning to summarize the main points.
Noun describing the way something is said or presented.
Verb meaning to attract and hold interest.
